temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A young man with blonde hair, Draco Malfoy, peeks around a large stone pillar with a worried expression. He whispers urgently to his friends, who are huddled in the dark, ruined room. He says, 'Come on!' and they all scramble to hide further behind the pillars as a loud rumbling sound echoes through the space. (Storyline: This scene establishes a moment of suspense and danger, as the characters are hiding from an unseen threat in a ruined building.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Urgent, hushed whisper. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous rumbling sound effect builds tension.)
(00:04-00:07) The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the full extent of the destruction. The room is filled with smoke and broken pieces of wood and stone. The three young men are now huddled together in a corner, their faces filled with fear and uncertainty as they look around the ruined space. (Storyline: This shot reinforces the characters' vulnerability and the gravity of their situation, highlighting their isolation and fear within the dangerous environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous rumbling continues, accompanied by the faint sound of crackling debris.)
